task_completion.description: The 'Yellow House, WA' trip is selected in the dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subsurface main window, the trip labeled 'Yellow House, WA' (or the dives under it) is highlighted/selected, while other trips (like 'Sund Rock') are not selected.

task_completion.description: The Export dialog is opened in Subsurface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog window is visible over the Subsurface main window.

task_completion.description: LaTeX is chosen as the export format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Export dialog, the option for LaTeX (.tex) is selected from the available export formats.

task_completion.description: The export is restricted to the selected dives only.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Export dialog, a checkbox or radio button for 'Selected dives' (or similar wording) is checked, ensuring 'All dives' is not selected.

task_completion.description: The file is saved to the correct path with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or file chooser dialog shows the current directory as '/home/ga/Documents/' (or the 'Documents' folder) and the file name entered as 'yellow_house_report.tex'.

task_completion.description: Subsurface is kept open at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshot of the trajectory, the Subsurface application window is still open and visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to perform the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Subsurface Export dialog and Save dialog being used, rather than terminal commands executing an export script.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create the .tex file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are seen creating or editing 'yellow_house_report.tex' with manually pasted content.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Subsurface application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine interaction with the Subsurface interface, such as clicking menus, selecting dives, and navigating dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target trip to export is 'Yellow House' and the trip to exclude is 'Sund Rock'. The expected output file path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/yellow_house_report.tex.
